title: Summarize Research Paper Abstract
scenario: Summarize the abstract of a scientific research paper (approximately 500 words) into a 1-2 sentence summary. The summary should capture the main research question, methodology, and key findings. Assume the reader has basic knowledge of the research field. The summary should be concise and focused on the most important information.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated summary is 1-2 sentences and does not exceed 50 words.
Verify that the summary captures the main research question.
Evaluate the accuracy of the methodology summary, ensuring it is correct and relevant.
Verify that the summary captures the key findings of the research.
